seo.title: Color Contrast Checker | Creative Lab
seo.description: Check text and background contrast according to WCAG.

product.title: Contrast Checker
product.description: Check whether text and background colors meet WCAG recommended contrast levels.

checker.title: Compare two colors
checker.intro: Select text and background colors to evaluate readability.
checker.previewParagraph: This text shows how the selected combination will look in a real content block.
checker.complianceDescription: Results for normal text, large text and graphical elements.
checker.suggestionsDescription: Nearby alternatives that improve contrast while preserving the style.
checker.exportDescription: Copy the CSS styles for the current combination.

info.title: How to check contrast with Creative Lab
info.description: Choose the colors, review the contrast ratio and confirm whether the combination meets AA and AAA levels.
info.stepThreeText: Use the suggestions to improve readability.
